data.title: Shiba Inu Burn Rate Spikes 1,273% In 24 Hours: What Is Going On?
data.description: Despite Shiba Inu's (CRYPTO: SHIB) volatile price movements, investors remain confident in light of token burns and an increasing number of wallet addresses.

data.title: Quanta Services Profits Surge In Q4, Projects $27.1 Billion In 2025 Revenue
data.description: Quanta Services Inc (PWR) reports Q4 revenue of $6.55B, missing consensus of $6.61B. Adjusted EBITDA and EPS improved. FY25 outlook exceeds expectations.

data.title: This Is What Whales Are Betting On Vale
HF Sinclair Reports Mixed Q4 Results, Weak Refining Margins Drive 93% Drop In Adjusted EBITDA
data.description: HF Sinclair reported mixed 2024 Q4 results with lower EPS, revenue decline of 195.14%, and dividend of $0.50 per share.

data.title: What's Going On With CrowdStrike Stock Today?
data.description: CrowdStrike disclosed the retirement of its Chief Security Officer. The company recently unveiled its new AI-driven security tool, Charlotte AI Detection Triage.
